allow: Bash(node -e "const lu = require\('react-icons/lu'\); const names = Object.keys\(lu\).filter\(k => /home|wheat|menu|search|sprout|cart|truck|package|phone|mail|map|bar|store|book|trend|shield|user|check|wrench|flask|plus|factory|chevron|calendar|message|badge|x$/i.test\(k\)\).sort\(\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lu = require\('react-icons/lu'\); const names = Object.keys\(lu\).sort\(\); const needed = ['Home','Wheat','Menu','X','Sprout','Search','ShoppingCart','Truck','Package','Phone','Mail','MapPin','Store','BookOpen','TrendingUp','TrendingDown','ShieldCheck','Users','Check','Wrench','Plus','Factory','ChevronUp','ChevronDown','Calendar','MessageCircle','BarChart','PackageSearch','ClipboardList','FlaskConical','Crosshair','User','BadgeIndianRupee']; needed.forEach\(n => { const found = names.find\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(n.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); const exact = names.includes\('Lu'+n\); console.log\(n + ': exact=' + exact + ' | closest=' + \(found||'NONE'\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const lu = require\('react-icons/lu'\); const names = Object.keys\(lu\).sort\(\); console.log\('Home-like:', names.filter\(n => /house/i.test\(n\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Chart-like:', names.filter\(n => /chart.*bar|bar.*chart/i.test\(n\)\).join\(', '\)\);")
